name: Peanut Butter Thumbprints
recipeInstructions:
1. In the large bowl of an electric mixer, beat the butter and peanut butter until creamy.
2. Add the brown sugar and beat for 1 minute to blend.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
4. Combine the flour and salt; slowly add to the creamed mixture, beating to blend.
5. Stir in the chopped peanuts.
6. Place 1-inch balls of dough on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Make an indentation in the centers with your thumb.
8. Fill each indentation with about 1/4 teaspoon raspberry jam.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 12 minutes.
10. Cool for a few minutes before removing to wire racks.
NOTES: The cookies can be frozen with or without the filling.
